title: Smoky Roasted Mediterannean-friendly Ground Cardomom Pilaf
description: This sweet and juicy Russian-inspired dish features ground cardamom in a comforting mediterranean-friendly twist.

ingredients.name: 1 cup rice (arborio or carnaroli)
ingredients.notes: Soak in water for at least 30 minutes

ingredients.name: 1/4 teaspoon ground cardamom
ingredients.notes: For a mediterranean twist, use a combination of cinnamon and cumin instead

instructions: Rinse the rice and drain. Soak in water for at least 30 minutes.
In a skillet, toast the walnuts over medium heat until golden brown, about 5 minutes.
Drain the soaked rice and transfer to a large mixing bowl with chopped herbs, minced garlic, olive oil, cardamom, and salt. Mix well.
Transfer the mixture into an oven-safe dish or pot. Cover with foil and bake at 375°F for 20-25 minutes until cooked through.
Serve hot as a side dish or alongside grilled fish.
